introSection: Busy Bee Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
This roller coaster operated at Sunny Beach Luna Park in Bulgaria from early 2012 until late 2013.

The ride then operated at Dreamland Margate in the UK during 2015 under the name Counter Culture Caterpillar. The following year, it was replaced by the Happy Caterpiller, however it was brought back after a refurbishment for 2017.

fullText:
Busy Bee Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, England, UK.

This roller coaster operated at Sunny Beach Luna Park in Bulgaria from early 2012 until late 2013.

The ride then operated at Dreamland Margate in the UK during 2015 under the name Counter Culture Caterpillar. The following year, it was replaced by the Happy Caterpiller, however it was brought back after a refurbishment for 2017.
